testcase.name: test_user_source_loading_prepends_source_root

failure.message: ImportError: It seems like you've installed the `zenml` package without the `local` extra, but are trying to use ZenML with a local database. * If you want to use ZenML in a local setup, please install `zenml[local]` instead, e.g. using `pip install 'zenml[local]'` * If you want to connect to a server, run `zenml login`

testcase.failure: tests/unit/utils/test_source_utils.py:126: in test_user_source_loading_prepends_source_root assert source_utils.load(correct_code_repo_source) == 1 src/zenml/utils/source_utils.py:102: in load _warn_about_potential_source_loading_issues(source=source) src/zenml/utils/source_utils.py:484: in _warn_about_potential_source_loading_issues local_repo = code_repository_utils.find_active_code_repository() src/zenml/utils/code_repository_utils.py:109: in find_active_code_repository code_repositories = depaginate(list_method=Client().list_code_repositories) src/zenml/utils/pagination_utils.py:35: in depaginate page = list_method(**kwargs) src/zenml/client_lazy_loader.py:213: in _inner return func(*args_, **kwargs) src/zenml/client.py:5881: in list_code_repositories project=project or self.active_project.id, src/zenml/client.py:1168: in active_project ) or GlobalConfiguration().get_active_project() src/zenml/config/global_config.py:789: in get_active_project _ = self.zen_store src/zenml/config/global_config.py:230: in __custom_getattribute__ value = super().__getattribute__(key) src/zenml/config/global_config.py:750: in zen_store self._configure_store(self.store_configuration) src/zenml/config/global_config.py:369: in _configure_store store = BaseZenStore.create_store(config, True, **kwargs) src/zenml/zen_stores/base_zen_store.py:238: in create_store store_class = BaseZenStore.get_store_class(config.type) src/zenml/zen_stores/base_zen_store.py:165: in get_store_class from zenml.zen_stores.sql_zen_store import SqlZenStore src/zenml/zen_stores/sql_zen_store.py:19: in <module> raise ImportError( E ImportError: It seems like you've installed the `zenml` package without the `local` extra, but are trying to use ZenML with a local database. E * If you want to use ZenML in a local setup, please install `zenml[local]` instead, e.g. using `pip install 'zenml[local]'` E * If you want to connect to a server, run `zenml login`

testcase.name: test_docs_url
testcase.failure: tests/unit/test_flavor.py:70: in test_docs_url assert AriaOrchestratorFlavor().docs_url == ( E AssertionError: assert 'https://zenm...strators/aria' == 'https://docs...strators/aria' E - https://docs.zenml.io/stack-components/orchestrators/aria E + https://zenml-io.gitbook.io/zenml-legacy-documentation/v/0.94.1/stack-components/orchestrators/aria

testcase.name: test_rlm_fallback_mode

failure.message: FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/app/examples/rlm_document_analysis'

testcase.failure: /app/tests/integration/examples/test_rlm_document_analysis.py:37: in test_rlm_fallback_mode with run_example( /usr/local/lib/python3.13/contextlib.py:141: in __enter__ return next(self.gen) /app/tests/integration/examples/utils.py:154: in run_example copy_example_files(examples_directory, str(dst_dir)) /app/tests/integration/examples/utils.py:109: in copy_example_files for item in os.listdir(example_dir): E FileNotFoundError: [Errno 2] No such file or directory: '/app/examples/rlm_document_analysis'
